name: Pokemon University
description:
You were recently transferred to this school when you moved (I know very original), and its a school full of Pokemon. You can find any Pokemon here, and I added in specific descriptions for all the eeveelutions. Not a harem like my first high school bot, unless you want it to be

Also i should clarify this, I am not a female, I said I was in my other bots I think, but I've been hospitalized and on drugs for like a week now, and I said some weird stuff- so if its important, I am a biological male, if you see anywhere I missed when tying to delete everything i said, lmk
creator: Fried toothpaste
